name: Shodan
description: This app integrates with the Shodan Search engine. It supports search and on-demand scanning APIs

actions.name: Search Ip
actions.description: Returns all services that have been found on the given host IP

parameters.name: history
parameters.description: True if all historical banners should be returned (default: False)

parameters.name: minify
parameters.description: True to only return the list of ports and the general host information, no banners. (default: False)

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Shodan search query. The provided string is used to search the database of banners in Shodan

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of properties to get summary information on

actions.name: Search Shodan
actions.description: Search Shodan using the same query syntax as the website and use facets to get summary information for different properties

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of properties to get summary information on

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to page through results 100 at a time (default: 1)

parameters.name: minify
parameters.description: Whether or not to truncate some of the larger fields (default: True)

actions.name: Search Token
actions.description: Break the search query into tokens

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Shodan search query. The provided string is used to search the database of banners in Shodan

actions.name: Scan Ports
actions.description: List all ports that Shodan is crawling on the Internet

actions.name: Scan Protocols
actions.description: List all protocols that can be used when performing on-demand Internet scans via Shodan

actions.name: Scan Ip Only
actions.description: Request Shodan to crawl an IP/ netblock

parameters.name: ip_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of IPs or netblocks (in CIDR notation) that should get crawled. ip_1,ip_2,...,ip_n

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Whether or not to force Shodan to re-scan the provided IPs. Only available to enterprise users

actions.name: Scan Ip Services
actions.description: A pipe-separated list of IPs or netblocks (in CIDR notation) that should get crawled with services

parameters.name: ip_with_services
parameters.description: A pipe-separated list of IP addresses along with their services. ip_1:[ip_1_service_1],[ip_1_service_2] | ip_2:[ip_2_service_1],[ip_2_service_2] | and so on

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Whether or not to force Shodan to re-scan the provided IPs. Only available to enterprise users

actions.name: Scan Internet
actions.description: Crawl the Internet for a specific port and protocol using Shodan

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port that Shodan should crawl the Internet for

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: The name of the protocol that should be used to interrogate the port. See /shodan/protocols for a list of supported protocols

actions.name: Scan Status Bulk
actions.description: Get list of all the created scans

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: From page number. Each page contains 100 scan results in it

actions.name: Shodan Scan Individual
actions.description: Get the status of a scan request

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique scan ID that was returned by /shodan/scan
